reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I'm totally satisfied with the teachers, environment, infrastructure as well as food.

review_content.Placements: About 95% of students got placed from here. The highest salary offered was Rs. 25,000 per month for a fresher, and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 7,000 per month. The average salary offered was around Rs. 15,000 per month. Prydan Software is the top recruiter here. Around 95%-97% of students got internships in companies like Prydan Software. The top role offered in the course is a software engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are labs, a computer room, advanced classrooms with audiovisual technology, a huge library, the latest computers, furniture, server and internet connection. The facilities are good. The food served is very good in quality and very inexpensive. There is a small indoor games room and many outdoor sports like volleyball, basketball, cricket and badminton. Our college provides basic first aid for medical issues.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: When I got admission to Khyati Foundation, it was a new college for me.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students are placed. The highest package is Rs. 25,000, and the lowest is Rs. 10,000. 3 companies visited, but I don't remember their names. 85% of students get an internship. There is a different roles offered like QA, development, front-end, and back-end development.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are good. Our canteen food tastes very good and is healthy. The sports ground is small, but we enjoy it a lot. The sports are also different, where we have competitions, but students enjoy them a lot.

review_summary.college_name: Khyati Foundation Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: If you have no option then you should take this college. There is nothing better here than campus.

content.Placements: No placements are offered to any student in this college. It has been only three years since BBA became was started in this college. If you do not have any options then you should do BBA.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is good. The college has two air-conditioners and libraries. There is a canteen, volleyball playground, basketball ground, table tennis, chess, carrom, etc. Wi-Fi is not available for students in college. There is no hostel here. The food served in the canteen is also of medium quality. Classrooms here are not good at all.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: If students want to experience good college life, then I would not recommend students to join this.

content.Placements: This college is small, so they did not provide placements or internships to the students.
content.Infrastructure: The whole institute has 2 libraries. The first one is on the ground floor, and 2nd one is on the top floor, both libraries are shared between all the institutes. The book collection is average, Wi-Fi is not provided for students. The canteen is small.
content.Faculty: In this college, teachers are average, students are mostly assistant professors. The teachers are not experienced enough, most professors are not skilled enough at teaching. This college follows the GU curriculum.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I'm totally satisfied with the teachers, environment, infrastructure as well as food.

content.Placements: About 95% of students got placed from here. The highest salary offered was Rs. 25,000 per month for a fresher, and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 7,000 per month. The average salary offered was around Rs. 15,000 per month. Prydan Software is the top recruiter here. Around 95%-97% of students got internships in companies like Prydan Software. The top role offered in the course is a software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: There are labs, a computer room, advanced classrooms with audiovisual technology, a huge library, the latest computers, furniture, server and internet connection. The facilities are good. The food served is very good in quality and very inexpensive. There is a small indoor games room and many outdoor sports like volleyball, basketball, cricket and badminton. Our college provides basic first aid for medical issues.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: When I got admission to Khyati Foundation, it was a new college for me.

content.Placements: 70% of students are placed. The highest package is Rs. 25,000, and the lowest is Rs. 10,000. 3 companies visited, but I don't remember their names. 85% of students get an internship. There is a different roles offered like QA, development, front-end, and back-end development.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are good. Our canteen food tastes very good and is healthy. The sports ground is small, but we enjoy it a lot. The sports are also different, where we have competitions, but students enjoy them a lot.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Biotechnology, Chemistry, Microbiology) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: College got great infrastructure with excellent faculty members. One can take admission for sure.

content.Placements: I'm a student of biotechnology and we had total of 10 students in our batch. The faculty members are good at teaching. They're friendly and the placements are not done through this college. As it only gives you the Bachelors course. Majority students go for placements after completing Masters degree.
content.Infrastructure: There is a hostel but I was not staying at the hostel. I have a home here. And the quality of food is average. Facilites we get here is a good library. And a lab with all the necessary equipments. Teachers are supportive. And we got well hygienic washroom for both boys and girls.

college_info.college_name: LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

faqs.answer: A:    LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology has been rated 3.4 on placements.
faqs.question: Does LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology provide good placement facilities?

faqs.answer:
A:    LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in appropriate branch of Engineering / Technology.
Or
Must have completed B.Sc with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) and mathematics as a compulsory subject in 10+2
Candidate who have completed B.Sc must have cleared subjects of Engineering Graphics / Engineering Drawing and Engineering Mechanics of the first year engineering programme along with second year subjects.B.Sc.Candidate must have passed 10+2 or its equivalent examination in any stream conducted by a recognised Board.B.ComCandidate must have completed 10+2 of Punjab School Education Board or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto with at least mentioned marks in the aggregate in case of commerce students who have passed 10+2 examination.
OR
40% for the students who have opted for two of the following commerce subjects in 10+2 (a) Accountancy (b) Business Studies (c) Economics (d) Mathematics (e) Office Management and Secretarial Practice (f) Principle and Practice of Insurance (g) Tax Procedure and Practice.
OR
45% for other candidates.BBAThose candidates who have passed their Matriculation examination and have also passed three year Diploma in any Trade from Punjab State Board of T
faqs.question: How can I get into LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology offers Degree courses including 12 UG and 1 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, B.Sc. specializations in Web Design.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology has courses such as B.Tech, B.Sc., B.Com, BBA, BCA, MBA/PGDM to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, Design, Medicine & Health Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, B.Sc. specializations in Web Design.
faqs.question: Which courses does LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology is up to 702. Good thing to know is that LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college but not that great as many colleges.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are good but not excellent. Almost 70%-80% of students get placed every year. The highest salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month. Companies like Amazon, Wipro, etc., visited the campus for placements. There is a placement cell. It is efficient and helpful. A ragging cell is also available on the campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. Amenities like Wi-Fi, labs, medical, sports and many more are available in our college. The food served in the mess is wonderful. The food served in the canteen is excellent. The sports facility is not that good as compared to other colleges. Overall the infrastructure is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The college is quite good and helpful in all sectors.

review_content.Placements: Our college has faced many treats earlier, but since the change of our principal, around 3 companies are visiting the campus to conduct placement drives. Many of our college students were offered jobs. The college offers placement opportunities for almost all students. Although the salary package is low, you'll surely get a job.
review_content.Infrastructure: Although our classrooms are not up to the mark, they are manageable. Almost all the classrooms are air-conditioned. Hostel rooms are good but are still not up to the mark. I am a sports person, so I must say that the college fulfils every need of a sports enthusiast. I'm very happy with the sports facilities offered here. I think the college needs to improve its classrooms, considering the facilities that its competitors have been offering.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good and supportive teachers.

content.Placements: Roles like full stack developer, app development, frontend developer, backend developer, data science, and web development are offered here. Sometimes many python based companies also came for hiring and offered their job roles. Overall, it is a good college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: I do not know about the hostel because I live near the college and I can go to my home easily after college. The canteen is average. Many sports activities are conducted in the college, and it is good.
content.Faculty: Semester exams in the college are based on your study. If you study more then you can easily pass the exams. You have to score above 60% to pass the semester. Exams are conducted in a good manner in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good teaching faculty, Moderate fee structure, not satisfying hostel facilities.

content.Placements: In my course there were around 50 students in our computer Science batch and out of them roughly 50% got placed. The average salary offered was 15k pm while the highest offered was 25k pm. The roles which they were given were regarding developers in Java, html and etc. Most of the students got internship offers from companies in Chandigarh.
content.Infrastructure: Talking about the infrastructure, the classes were big and well maintained. Also the library was very much big with capacity of 100+ students at a time and a conference room was attached with the library of capacity around 80. Labs were also well maintained and were equipped with latest technology required for the subjects. Yet the accommodation facility was not up to the mark, along with that the quality of food was poor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college but not that great as many colleges.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good but not excellent. Almost 70%-80% of students get placed every year. The highest salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month. Companies like Amazon, Wipro, etc., visited the campus for placements. There is a placement cell. It is efficient and helpful. A ragging cell is also available on the campus.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. Amenities like Wi-Fi, labs, medical, sports and many more are available in our college. The food served in the mess is wonderful. The food served in the canteen is excellent. The sports facility is not that good as compared to other colleges. Overall the infrastructure is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college is quite good and helpful in all sectors.

content.Placements: Our college has faced many treats earlier, but since the change of our principal, around 3 companies are visiting the campus to conduct placement drives. Many of our college students were offered jobs. The college offers placement opportunities for almost all students. Although the salary package is low, you'll surely get a job.
content.Infrastructure: Although our classrooms are not up to the mark, they are manageable. Almost all the classrooms are air-conditioned. Hostel rooms are good but are still not up to the mark. I am a sports person, so I must say that the college fulfils every need of a sports enthusiast. I'm very happy with the sports facilities offered here. I think the college needs to improve its classrooms, considering the facilities that its competitors have been offering.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: Placements are really good, and the education provided is also up to the mark.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are really good. The placement cell is very helpful for students to solve their queries and makes good efforts to get good companies to college. Companies like HCL came to the college for placements, and almost all the students got placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. Wi-Fi facility is available for students, and the library has all the required books. The classrooms are quite good, and the labs and classrooms are fully air-conditioned. The auditorium of the college is big, and all the guest lectures and activities are performed there.

paragraphs: LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology considers scores in JEE Main, CBSE 12th, and PSEB 12th for admission to specific courses.LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technologyoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 57,000 - 2,41,850. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,20,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

faqs.question: How can I get into LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in appropriate branch of Engineering / Technology.
Or
Must have completed B.Sc with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) and mathematics as a compulsory subject in 10+2
Candidate who have completed B.Sc must have cleared subjects of Engineering Graphics / Engineering Drawing and Engineering Mechanics of the first year engineering programme along with second year subjects.B.Sc.Candidate must have passed 10+2 or its equivalent examination in any stream conducted by a recognised Board.B.ComCandidate must have completed 10+2 of Punjab School Education Board or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto with at least mentioned marks in the aggregate in case of commerce stu

faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology is up to 702. Good thing to know is that LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college but not that great as many colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. Amenities like Wi-Fi, labs, medical, sports and many more are available in our college. The food served in the mess is wonderful. The food served in the canteen is excellent. The sports facility is not that good as compared to other colleges. Overall the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is quite good and helpful in all sectors.
reviews.review_text: Although our classrooms are not up to the mark, they are manageable. Almost all the classrooms are air-conditioned. Hostel rooms are good but are still not up to the mark. I am a sports person, so I must say that the college fulfils every need of a sports enthusiast. I'm very happy with the sports facilities offered here. I think the college needs to improve its classrooms, considering the facilities that its competitors have been offering.

reviews.review_heading: Only for the knowledge seekers.
reviews.review_text: LCET has a good infrastructure but not very big as other colleges and university. The college has one library with approximately 20,000 books, there are separate labs for all the different stream and there is one canteen. The college has two grounds.

reviews.review_heading: We don't know how 3 years passed in our college. Excellent staff and good friends.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is always available but with some network rules as provide to all students. Good quality labs with the latest technology computers and software installed on it. Classrooms are clean and easy to sit in with a fresh environment. All types of books are available on our library and a silence environment. Our college is taking parts in several games and most of the students are gone for further state level amd national level championships.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money and time. The best college and have the boosting environment one can ask for.
reviews.review_text: The college offers free of cost Wi-Fi services 24*7 for both the students and the staff. Along with it, students have access to books for various authors easily. All the classrooms and labs are fully air-conditioned. There is a well-maintained auditorium where all the major events are performed.

reviews.review_heading: I think you can miss your career if you don't study in this college.
reviews.review_text: This is a very big college in Ludhiana. In the front, the administration building is located to help the students with any queries. You can go to admin block and ask your doubts. There are different blocks for all streams. There is an auditorium. There is a canteen for students and staff.

reviews.review_heading: Average placements, but skilled faculty.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well furnished. There are 2 grounds where we can sit or play games. Every year, an annual athletic meet is held where you can take part in any games. Separate hostels are available for boys and girls. Classrooms are unlimited. You can sit anywhere.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college to study.
reviews.review_text: The structure of this building is comfortable, and it is easy to find any department for the new-comers without any help. The college has a big playground and hostel facilities for both girls and boys. In front of the main gate, there is an administrator block for the visitors.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MCA course at ASAS Mysuru?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of MCA is INR 2.30 lakh. Candidates will also need to pay a caution deposit of INR 3,000. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. However, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates are advised to visit the official website for a detailed ASAS Mysuru MCA fee structure.

overview_faqs.question: Is BCom expensive at ASAS Mysuru?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of BCom is INR 1.9 lakh. Candidates will also need to pay a caution deposit of INR 3,000. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. However, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates are advised to visit the official website for a detailed ASAS Mysuru BCom fee structure.

overview_faqs.question: Is Amrita School of Arts and Sciences approved?
overview_faqs.answer: Amrita School of Arts and Sciences is a part of Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham and is approved by UGC (University Grants Commission). Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Mysore is accredited with A+ Grade by NAAC (National Assessment and Accreditation Council). Amrita School of Arts and Sciences, through five departments, offers undergraduate, postgraduate, PhD, and other courses to students across Management and Commerce, Computer Science, and various other streams.

overview_faqs.answer: INR 2.42 Lacs is the total tuition cost for the Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) programme at Amrita School of Arts and Sciences. In addition to the tuition, students must pay a one-time enrollment fee of INR 3,000 and a dorm cost of INR 1.97 lakh.ASAS, Amritapuri, Kollam charges INR 1.14 Lacs for the first year of BCA tuition. For the academic year 2024–2025, the costs for Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham's BCA Honours programme are INR 48,700 for tuition and INR 3,000 for a caution deposit. The BCA program's fees are structured like a slab system; when a student's CGPA falls, so do the expenses.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BCA + MCA - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Average college life with decent academics.

content.Placements: Course is MCA and BCA, and the duration is 5 years. Passing out is 2030. Approximately 60-70 percent of students got placed from the course. The recruiting companies are TCS, HCL, IBM, etc. Around 40 - 50 percent of students got internships. Top roles offered are software developer, junior Java developer, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-maintained classrooms with proper seating arrangements, projects, and a good learning environment. The campus is equipped with Wi-Fi connectivity, computer labs, and a library. The hostel facilities include clean rooms, regular water supply, and electricity. The quality of food in the mess is average, with only vegetarian options available. Medical facilities are available on campus or nearby. The college also provides facilities for sports and games, including indoor games and outdoor sports areas.

individual_reviews.course: MCA in AI, Data Science and Cyber Security. - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Must join if you are really interested in academics.

content.Placements: 65-70% of students got placed in our course MCA. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Cisco, IBM, TCS, Federal Bank, HDFC Bank, and many more. The roles offered are software developer, data analytics, sales and marketing, finance and consulting, and many more. The highest package offered is 10.5 LPA. The average package is 4 LPA - 5 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. I think around 20-25% of students got internships from MCA and the companies IBM, Infosys, and Deloitte based on my knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure and facilities in our college for all the students and faculty members too. There are classrooms that can accommodate around 60 students in each class. Students are facilitated with the campus Wi-Fi, projectors, and speakers so that it will be audible for all the students who are sitting at the last. As a day scholar, I have not personally experienced the facilities available in the hostel but based on my friend's experience I can say that they have good food, Wi-Fi, and strong security facilities.

individual_reviews.course: MCA in AI, Data Science and Cyber Security. - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Totally the college is value for money and teachers are more friendly and supportive.

content.Placements: There are some good placements happening here, and I can confidently say that my experience has been quite positive. When I first joined, I was a little unsure about how effective the placement cell would be; but over time, I realized that the college genuinely puts effort into getting students placed in good companies. We have several reputed companies visiting the campus and the training provided before the interviews is extremely helpful.
content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure for my course and hostel facilities in my college. In terms of student amenities, the college provides hostels, canteens, medical facilities and common rooms. Our hostel rooms are spacious and well kept and there is atmosphere in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: MCA in Cyber Security - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about my college.

content.Placements: The mass recruiters hired almost everyone without any backlogs. It seemed they had a tie-up with CTS, which was also a good option. It was a good experience, I had two campus placements, one at Aricent and the other at Nagarro. Many companies visited our campus for placements, a few of them were Aricent, Nagarro, One Nine Seven Communication, Sapient, GlobalLogic, Microsoft, Adobe, MakeMyTrip, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The mess food was really bad. Non-veg was not allowed inside the college campus. The mess food was vegetarian and also Kerala-type food. It was not spicy at all and not good for Tamil Nadu or Andhra students. The hostel faculty members were good enough, and the environment was very clean.

individual_reviews.course: MCA in AI, Data Science and Cyber Security. - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Highly professional and well-maintained college in and around Mysore.

content.Placements: An average of 50-70% of the students get placed in our course from our senior batch the highest package is 30 LPA and the lowest is 2.5 LPA, the average would be around 3.5 LPA. Recruiting companies for our course are Wipro, Adobe, HP, and Teach Mahindra. Some of the IT companies are Consulting and finance companies like Deloitte, Federal Bank, etc. Up to 80% of the students get internships Roles offered for our course are full sack developed, application developed, UI UX designer, System administration, and Tester.
content.Infrastructure: They have Wi-Fi on every floor of the building computer labs are maintained very well and every classroom has a blackboard along with projectors. I am a day scholar, and I don't know about hostel facilities but the canteen food is good but costlier. They have separate ladies' rooms where only ladies are allowed so they can rest during medical emergencies.

admission_process.title: Amrita School of Arts and Sciences, Mysuru Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Amrita School of Arts & Sciences, Mysuru admission is only merit-based. The school offers admission based on scores obtained in the last qualifying exam, followed by a Personal Interview (PI) round to shortlist candidates for specific courses. ASAS Mysuru admissions are offered for various UG and PG levels in multiple streams like Arts, Computer Applications, Science, etc.Amrita School of Arts & Sciences, Mysuruoffers courses underAmrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham. Read the following article to know more aboutAmrita School of Arts & Sciences admission 2025.

Amrita School of Arts & Sciences,Mysuruadmissions 2025 are currently open. Admission to all the courses at the college is merit-based. Candidates, however, for all courses are required to meet minimum eligibility criteria to get shortlisted for Amrita School of Arts & Sciences, Mysuru courses. Check below popular courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria related toAmrita School of Arts & Sciences,Mysuru course admission 2025:
Class 12 or equivalent with at least 55% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics
Candidates passing Class12 or equivalent with Statistics/ Accountancy will have the option to secure admission based only on the marks scored in Class 12
BA/ BSc/ BCom/ any other degree with Mathematics as one of the subjects in Class 12 or BE/ BTech/ BCA/ BSc Computer Science/ BSc with Mathematics
Class 12 or equivalent with at least 55% aggregate
Candidates born on or after July 1, 2002
PU/ Class 12 in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate or 3 year Polytechnic diploma
Candidates born on or after July 1, 2002
Graduation in relevant disciplines with at least 50% aggregate
Amrita School of Arts & Sciences,Mysuru course admissions 2025 for all courses are entirely merit-based. Check below the completeAmrita School of Arts & Sciences,Mysuru admission process:
Step 1: Application Process
For admission to any of the UG and PG courses at the institute, the mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds
The institute provides admission to all courses based on their past academic records, followed by PI round and applications submitted by candidates.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Average college life with decent academics.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-maintained classrooms with proper seating arrangements, projects, and a good learning environment. The campus is equipped with Wi-Fi connectivity, computer labs, and a library. The hostel facilities include clean rooms, regular water supply, and electricity. The quality of food in the mess is average, with only vegetarian options available. Medical facilities are available on campus or nearby. The college also provides facilities for sports and games, including indoor gam...

reviews.review_heading: Must join if you are really interested in academics.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure and facilities in our college for all the students and faculty members too. There are classrooms that can accommodate around 60 students in each class. Students are facilitated with the campus Wi-Fi, projectors, and speakers so that it will be audible for all the students who are sitting at the last. As a day scholar, I have not personally experienced the facilities available in the hostel but based on my friend's experience I can say that they have good food, Wi-Fi,...

reviews.review_heading: Totally the college is value for money and teachers are more friendly and supportive.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure for my course and hostel facilities in my college. In terms of student amenities, the college provides hostels, canteens, medical facilities and common rooms. Our hostel rooms are spacious and well kept and there is atmosphere in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: The mess food was really bad. Non-veg was not allowed inside the college campus. The mess food was vegetarian and also Kerala-type food. It was not spicy at all and not good for Tamil Nadu or Andhra students. The hostel faculty members were good enough, and the environment was very clean.

reviews.review_heading: Highly professional and well-maintained college in and around Mysore.
reviews.review_text: They have Wi-Fi on every floor of the building computer labs are maintained very well and every classroom has a blackboard along with projectors. I am a day scholar, and I don't know about hostel facilities but the canteen food is good but costlier. They have separate ladies' rooms where only ladies are allowed so they can rest during medical emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amrita School of Arts and Sciences, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Mysuru Campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Wi-Fi facility is available in our college, but its speed is slow. It is possibly the slowest network among all colleges. It will be difficult for students and faculty members to access online recourses.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for education.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is a bit strict. Students must get in by 6.30 PM and should have an outing pass to go out. Students get access from 3.30 PM to 6.30 PM regularly for outings. Wi-Fi provided in the hostel is good, with an average speed. Food served in the mess in the morning and afternoon is good, but dinner is not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is good in terms of academics, but campus life here is average.
reviews.review_text: There is no advanced equipment. There are only average equipments. There is not even a good projector or sound system to enjoy a film, which is very essential for a filmmaker. They are improving the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and infra.
reviews.review_text: The 400 acres campus is well planned with infrastructure like academic buildings, administration wing, central library, hostels, guest house, staff-quarters, shopping complex, swimming pool and play grounds. The campus has built-up area of over 28 lakh sq. Feet linked by 7 km black topped roads. Eight hostels accommodate 5000 students. A swimming pool meeting Olympic standards is utlized by students, staff and others in the campus. Two power houses are installed with total generating capacity of...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college but the food needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: In this college, all the facilities provided are good. There is Wi-Fi facility, computer labs, science labs, studios, seminar halls, library, and classrooms available. Facilities in hostel are good but the food provide is not so tasty. The canteen is nice and sports and games facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good staff members and we have a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available and we have well-equipped labs and lab technicians. We have a good library with books and physical books in our library. We have the best place to study in the library and we can borrow books from it. We have a canteen, medical facilities, and a gym on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides very good coaching and we strongly recommend others to join our institution.
reviews.review_text: We have very clean classrooms in our college. The library has all the books necessary for the students. We have a Wi-Fi facility in classrooms. Labs are very perfect. The staff members are also very helpful. The curriculum is good. There are no issues in college about studies or any other thing.

reviews.review_heading: The college has absolutely good placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pleasant, and the study environment is good. The college offers multiple facilities like free Wi-Fi, library and also an online library. Each classroom and lab is big enough and has a projector and Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Really good placements .
reviews.review_text: College will provide Wi-Fi facilities and library and have a nice infrastructure good environment with no disturbance and college will conduct fests and programs and sports as well as cultural activities and have a nice labs for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for BCA with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in our college. The classrooms are spacious, and all the necessary facilities are provided for students. The laboratories are good as well. Wi-Fi is free for students, students also have a good library that has all books necessary for students. For sports, it has a ground and a basketball court, and also there is a gym for students.

likes.text: Companies like SAP Labs, Deloitte, Cognizant, Wipro, Capgemini, and many others came for placements.

college_info.college_name: Amrita School of Arts and Sciences Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The total tuition fee of BCom is INR 1.9 lakh. Candidates will also need to pay a caution deposit of INR 3,000. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission.

However, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates are advised to visit the official website for a detailed ASAS Mysuru BCom fee structure.
Yes, Amrita School of Arts and Sciences offers scholarships to students as financial assistance. The scholarship details for Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham students are as follows:
Scholarships | Marks (As per the Indian Equivalency System) | Fee Waiver
• Amrita Chancellor scholarship | > 75% in Grade 12/ UG/ PG | 100% tuition fee waiver
• Amrita Meritorious scholarship | 70% to 74% in Grade 12/ UG | 75% tuition fee waiver
• Amrita Meritorious scholarship | 60% to 70% in Grade 12/ UG | 50% tuition fee waiver
These scholarships are applicable for undergraduate, postgraduate, and PhD programs. The scholarship is issued at the complete discretion of the University.

Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham provides tuition-free scholarships; however, each scholarship has a different amount of the waiver. These awards are renewed annually in accordance with the student's behaviour and academic standing. It is not possible for students to hold more than one scholarship at once.

Amrita Chancellor Scholarship: students who earn at least 75% in Grade 12 or UG/PG are eligible for a 100% tuition price waiver.Amrita Scholarship of merit: 74% of students with 70% to 74% will not have to pay tuition.

INR 2.42 Lacs is the total tuition cost for the Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) programme at Amrita School of Arts and Sciences. In addition to the tuition, students must pay a one-time enrollment fee of INR 3,000 and a dorm cost of INR 1.97 lakh.ASAS, Amritapuri, Kollam charges INR 1.14 Lacs for the first year of BCA tuition. For the academic year 2024–2025, the costs for Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham's BCA Honours programme are INR 48,700 for tuition and INR 3,000 for a caution deposit. The BCA program's fees are structured like a slab system; when a student's CGPA falls, so do the expenses.

college_info.intro: The Institute offers Undergraduate courses such as BA, BSc, BCom, BVA, BBA, BCA and Postgraduate courses including MA, MSc, and MCom. Admission to the respective courses is offered on the basis of merit and entrance. Therefore, candidates must secure the minimum aggregate in Class 12 for UG level admissions. Whereas, for PG level admissions, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in graduation. The fee structure of the respective courses includes tuition fees, which may vary from INR 75K to INR 4 Lakh. faqs.answer: A:    Biyani Girls College admissions are offered on the basis of merit. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 and graduation to seek admission to UG and PG level programmes. Furthermore, the College has not yet declared any examination level requirement as a part of the eligibility criteria. However, while applying for the admission to Biyani Girls College, candidates must enquire the same from the College administration office for the respective course eligibility criteria.
faqs.question: Can I join Biyani Girls College without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    Biyani Girls College offers courses such as BSc for 3 years to 4 years with various specialisations. The College offers respective course on the basis of merit with an annual course fees varying from INR 75K to INR 80K. In addition to this, Biyani Girls College offers the respective course with the annual hostel fees of worth INR 1.20 Lakh. Apart from this, candidates are ought to pay INR 1,100 as the application fees.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at Biyani Girls College?

faqs.answer: A:    In order to apply for BSc-MEd course at Biyani Girls College, candidates should complete a PG with 55% aggregate (general). For other categories, students should complete PG with 50% aggregate. Apart from this, the duration of the course is three years. The degree is offered through the University of Rajasthan.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for BSc-MEd course at Biyani Girls College?

faqs.answer: A:    The selection criteria for various course admissions at Biyani BEd Girls College is merit-based. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am not fully satisfied with my college life here.

review_content.Placements: There were no students who received placements from the college, and no companies came. I don't think that if someone does get a placement, the student should rely on on-campus placements. They should consider off-campus options. I believe the highest placement package was 3 or 4 LPA, and I don't think that's good.
review_content.Infrastructure: There was Wi-Fi with medium speed. The labs are good, and the classrooms are also good. The library was full of many books and had plenty of space. I didn't visit the hostel, but my classmates said it wasn't very good. The mess and canteen food weren't great, and the canteen was often empty. For half a year, the only things available in the canteen were biscuits, chips, and Kurkure. Sometimes, they host parties, but even the parties were sometimes spoiled.

review_content.Placements: The college brings many opportunities for students to build themself for their future. Biyani Girls College placements are exceptional. Most importantly, teachers are very supportive and encouraging. The college provides us with good internships for a better future.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of college infrastructure significantly affects students' perception of their well-being. The college offers well-maintained classrooms with tidy chairs and reliable Wi-Fi with internet access. Our college also provides hostels with rules and regulations to ensure student safety.

review_summary.college_name: Biyani Girls College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college. Don't take a job, give it.

content.Placements: The students of our college passed with a very good percentage and got placed in different and best companies. They provide us with different courses at the college campus. They also provide internships in different companies and in college. They organised different placement opportunities for the growth of the students.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs of college are very good. The food in canteen is tasty and healthy. The facilities of that college are also great. The canteen is also very hygienic and clean. The staff of this college is also good in their behaviour. They promote daily activities like yoga and sports for the good health of the students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of BIyani Girls College, Jaipur.

content.Placements: 80% of students get placed. The college provides a good placement opportunity. Many well-known companies recruit students from our college. Many paid and unpaid internships are also provided. Overall, placement opportunities are good and well-managed.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is overall good. College is located in Vidyadhar Nagar, which is a good area. The building has been well-maintained. Classes are fully furnished and spacious. Proper ventilation is provided. It has a well-maintained auditorium also.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am not fully satisfied with my college life here.

content.Placements: There were no students who received placements from the college, and no companies came. I don't think that if someone does get a placement, the student should rely on on-campus placements. They should consider off-campus options. I believe the highest placement package was 3 or 4 LPA, and I don't think that's good.
content.Infrastructure: There was Wi-Fi with medium speed. The labs are good, and the classrooms are also good. The library was full of many books and had plenty of space. I didn't visit the hostel, but my classmates said it wasn't very good. The mess and canteen food weren't great, and the canteen was often empty. For half a year, the only things available in the canteen were biscuits, chips, and Kurkure. Sometimes, they host parties, but even the parties were sometimes spoiled.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Biyani Group of Colleges is good for women and their careers.

content.Placements: The college brings many opportunities for students to build themself for their future. Biyani Girls College placements are exceptional. Most importantly, teachers are very supportive and encouraging. The college provides us with good internships for a better future.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of college infrastructure significantly affects students' perception of their well-being. The college offers well-maintained classrooms with tidy chairs and reliable Wi-Fi with internet access. Our college also provides hostels with rules and regulations to ensure student safety.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with Biyani Girls College, as it aims for nurturing young women leaders.

content.Placements: College brings placement opportunities for students on a regular basis with renowned organizations. Also, the college organizes a placement drive every year in which approximately 30-40 companies participate together to recruit skilled and qualified students for vacant job roles.
content.Infrastructure: College is good and has a peaceful environment that brings positivity. It also has various facilities, including a gym area, counseling facilities, canteen facilities, club areas (activity-wise), libraries, smart classrooms, an auditorium, a computer lab, and a Science lab.

admission_overview.college_name: Biyani Girls College Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Fee, Application Process

admission_overview.title: Biyani Girls College Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Currently, Biyani Girls College admissions 2025 is open. The college offers more than ten courses including certificate courses. The selection criteria is based on merit The application process at Biyani Girls College is both an online/offline procedure. The college also offers over 12 certificate courses and the college is affiliated with the University of Rajasthan. However, the UG integrated course is offered by Biyani Girls College. Read on to know more about various Biyani Girls College programmes and their respective admission criteria

eligibility_selection.title: Biyani Girls College Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Biyani Girls College admissions to UG & PG courses are based on merit/entrance exam. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria for the BGEC courses 2025:

courses_table.eligibility: Candidates must have passed 10+2 (Science stream) from a recognised board with a minimum 50% aggregate marks.
Graduation in a relevant science discipline from a recognized university with a minimum 50% aggregate marks.

faqs.answer: To secure a seat at Biyani Girls College, students can check the following steps presented below:Visit the official website and complete the online application process.Ensure eligibility and merit-based selection for UG and PG programs.Sit and appear for entrance exam as per respective courses.Upon being selected, pay the specified fee to confirm and secure your seat.
faqs.question: How do I get a seat at Biyani Girls College?

paragraphs: Biyani Girls College admission process includes registration, selection, national/university/state entrance exam score and admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the steps below to get a seat in Biyani Girls College:
STEP 1: Biyani Girls College Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the college. Candidates need to pay an application fee as per the respective courses.
STEP 2: Selection Round

Biyani Girls B.Ed College shortlists candidates based on Merit. Apart from this, candidates also have to meet the educational qualifications set by the college. Students can also check the course-wise eligibility from the table above for the top courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the college releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted a seat in the college. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

hostel_campus.college_name: Biyani Girls College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college. Don't take a job, give it.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs of college are very good. The food in canteen is tasty and healthy. The facilities of that college are also great. The canteen is also very hygienic and clean. The staff of this college is also good in their behaviour. They promote daily activities like yoga and sports for the good health of the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of BIyani Girls College, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is overall good. College is located in Vidyadhar Nagar, which is a good area. The building has been well-maintained. Classes are fully furnished and spacious. Proper ventilation is provided. It has a well-maintained auditorium also.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Biyani College of Science and ManagementReviewed on 14 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am not fully satisfied with my college life here.
reviews.review_text: There was Wi-Fi with medium speed. The labs are good, and the classrooms are also good. The library was full of many books and had plenty of space. I didn't visit the hostel, but my classmates said it wasn't very good. The mess and canteen food weren't great, and the canteen was often empty. For half a year, the only things available in the canteen were biscuits, chips, and Kurkure. Sometimes, they host parties, but even the parties were sometimes spoiled.

reviews.review_heading: Biyani Group of Colleges is good for women and their careers.
reviews.review_text: The quality of college infrastructure significantly affects students' perception of their well-being. The college offers well-maintained classrooms with tidy chairs and reliable Wi-Fi with internet access. Our college also provides hostels with rules and regulations to ensure student safety.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with Biyani Girls College, as it aims for nurturing young women leaders.
reviews.review_text: College is good and has a peaceful environment that brings positivity. It also has various facilities, including a gym area, counseling facilities, canteen facilities, club areas (activity-wise), libraries, smart classrooms, an auditorium, a computer lab, and a Science lab.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for girls' education, and it also works for empowering women.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is well-maintained and offers a clean and healthy learning environment. The hostel offers clean and comfortable rooms. It offers good quality food. Many classrooms are well-equipped.

reviews.review_heading: Biyani Girls College of Nursing: Good faculty and infrastructure, needs better placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities in the college are well-maintained and equipped with all essential amenities to ensure a comfortable stay for students. While the accommodation capacity is adequate, availability may become limited during peak admission periods, so applying early is advisable. The hostels offer a secure environment with round-the-clock surveillance and staff support. Regular cleaning and maintenance are carried out to maintain hygiene and provide a healthy living atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: The inside life of a nursing student.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-structured campus. Academic facilities like a lecture hall with smart boards are available. The hostel is clean, safe, and under warden supervision. There are mess facilities with nutritious meals. Sports and games are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Biyani Law CollegeReviewed on 27 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with overall facilities.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the hostel is average. It has a clean environment. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is edible and hygienic. The overall facilities of the college are above average. They provide Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a cafeteria, restrooms, medical rooms, and so on. They also have a huge ground and court.

reviews.review_heading: It has great faculty members and excellent infrastructure. Placement opportunities need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our course facilities are very good. We have Wi-Fi available in the classrooms. The library is also available. Everything is available and good. The hostel facilities are also good. The food in the mess and canteen is also good. We also have excellent sports and games facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Biyani Law CollegeReviewed on 1 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: My college through my eyes.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are well-furnished and air-conditioned. The lab is fully maintained. We have a clean library. It has helpful and valuable books. They have useful content for the legal professions in our college. Medical facilities are available. Sports activities are held every 3-4 weeks.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Biyani Law CollegeReviewed on 6 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The College is Nice Compared to Others Nearby
reviews.review_text: The college has a library where all the bare acts and various types of books are available. The college also has a moot court, where we practice for our careers, argue with each other, and share our points of view on the laws made by the government and our opinions.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Biyani College of Science and ManagementReviewed on 13 Aug 2024)
reviews.review_heading: An average teacher training college .
reviews.review_text: My course was a teacher training course, and we had to study how to teach students, learn the methods of teaching, and practice those techniques. The college also provided hostel facilities. The hostels were well maintained, the food quality was amazing, and the menu setup was very good and nutritious.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Biyani Law CollegeReviewed on 6 Aug 2024)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best law college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is excellent, and good facilities are available like food, Wi-Fi, medical facilities, etc., in both college and hostel. Sports and games are available every month, cultural events are performed, and the mess and canteen are hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Biyani Law CollegeReviewed on 31 May 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The facilities is excellent in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available in our college is quite satisfactory. Our college provides all the facilities to the students. The resources we have in our college include a huge library, high-speed internet-run labs, standardized classrooms, modern medical services, and facilities, and many more. The hostels of our college are also well-equipped and good. At the hostel, the food served to the students is very healthy, clean and safe for human consumption. They do not offer bonuses for sports parti...

paragraphs: Biyani Girls College offers courses at the UG and PG level in full-time mode for durations varying from 2 years to 4 years. The College offers admission to the respective courses on the basis of merit and valid scores of accepted entrance exams. Furthermore, the College offers respective courses for the annual course fees varying from INR 30K to INR 85K. Whereas, the annual hostel fees is INR 1.20 Lakh. The application fees is worth INR 1,100. To conclude, being a private College Biyani does offer courses at beyond affordability quotient for students.

paragraphs: Kaushalya The Skills University admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for certain entrance exams to take admission. The college offers a variety of courses to the candidates at the UG, PG, Certificate and Doctorate level in the field of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Teaching and Education, Aviation, Beauty and Fitness, Banking and Finance and Insurance. Read below for more details on Kaushalya The Skills University admission process:

college_info.intro: Roots Collegium provides Degree and Certificate programmes across several specialisations. The flagship programmes include BA and BCom. Both the programmes are provided for the duration of 3 years. These programmes are served in affiliation with Osmania University. BA specialisations include Mass Communication, History, Economics, Political Science and Game Art and Design among many others. On the other hand, BCom is offered in Computer Applications and Sales Advertisement. Candidates can take a look at the Roots Collegium popular programmes:

For a government job, the candidate must have the relevant technical knowledge and analytical skills. The BCom graduates of Roots Collegium can apply for any of the government jobs. However, their selection shall depend upon the individual's
faqs.question: What are the government job profiles for B.Com graduates of Roots Collegium?

To get a government job, aspirants have to meet the criteria prescribed by the respective authorities. The candidates must also have the required technical knowledge and analytical skills. BSc graduates of Roots Collegium can also apply for research positions at national institutes and laboratories. faqs.question: What are the government job profiles for B.Sc graduates at Roots Collegium?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Roots Collegium provides various six undergraduate, eight diploma, and two intermediate programme in various specialisations. Additionally, the institute also has a Finishing school which provides courses such as The Art of Speaking, Articulation Skills, Personality & Image, Protocol, and Placement Etiquette. Below are the Roots Collegium courses, fees, and eligibility:

faqs.answer: A:    Roots Collegium does not require any entrance test score for admissions to BBA courses. The college offers BBA and BBA in Business Analytics as two different courses and admissions are based on the marks score by the candidates in TSBIE/ CBSE/ CISCE or equivalent. The TSBIE refers to Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education. It is clear from the name that this academic board is set up for conducting and regulating intermediate studies and results in the state specifically besides the other boards of education.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Roots Collegium accept for admission to BBA?

faqs.answer: A:    Roots Collegium has not specified the minimum aggregate to get admission in a course. However, aspirants must complete a minimum of Class 12 for UG courses. A 70% aggregate in Class 12 is a decent score and can get admission in any of the UG courses offered by Roots Collegium.
faqs.question: Can I get into Roots Collegium with 70% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates must pass Class 12 or equivalent to apply for Roots Collegium BBA programme. Aspirants are selected for BBA based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Hence, candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for admission to BBA course.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BBA at Roots Collegium?

faqs.answer: A:    Roots Collegium is one of the highly reputed management institutes which is affiliated to Osmania University, Telangana board of Intermediate, Toastmasters, ACCA, Alliance francis, JNAFAU, YI, CII and others.The institute offers a total of 34 courses under 8 different programmes. B.A, BCT, and B.Sc are among the most popular courses offered at Roots Collegium. A total of 15 courses are offered under the B.A programme the fees ranges from INR 90,000  to 2.33 Lacs for B.A. courses.The total tuition fees for B.Sc courses is  INR 1.9 lakh.The total tuition fees for B.Com courses ranges from INR 1,20,000 to 1,50,000.The institute also offers Diploma courses the total tuition fees for Diploma courses is INR 1.8 Lakh.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am very lucky to be studying in this college.

review_content.Placements: Placements are really good for a graduate. Amazon, Flipkart, etc. are the top recruiting companies. The average package ranges between 5 to 6 Lacs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course is really good, the college infrastructure is good—not the best, but good—we have a library, a playroom, a canteen, a computer lab, and other amenities. However, our campus does not have a hostel. In addition, medical facilities are excellent.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are really helpful; most have done an MBA, and very few are new. However, the quality of their teaching is very high. The course content is relevant, and the semester exams are not especially difficult; rather, it is the students who make them difficult by failing to prepare.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: There is no good infrastructure and no value for money, and there will be pressure to pay fees.

review_content.Placements: About 50% to 60% of students got placements. The highest salary package is 14 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiters include Deloitte and some other tech and marketing companies. A few students got internships in the final year of our course. The top roles provided in our course are business management, marketing lead, HR, and other manager jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: A library and air conditioners are available. Because of COVID, there is no canteen. There is no sports zone, no proper ground or place to encourage sports. The classroom is okay. There is no hostel facility. You need to stay at a private hostel. There are no games.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2021

faqs.answer: TSBIE is the Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education which is responsible for conducting the Class 11th and 12th public examinations. 75% in TSBIE is an acceptable score for admissions to B.Sc. courses at Roots Collegium, Hyderabad. It is in fact more than the basic eligibility criteria mentioned by the college which asks for at least 50% marks or above in class 12th examination from a recognised board/ university. However, make sure that you are from the Science stream. Admissions are based on performance in the qualifying exams, written entrance test and a personal interview round.

overview_faqs.question: Is B.Sc available in Roots Collegium?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Roots Collegium offers a three-year BSc programme. The UG-level course is available in Data Science specialisation with Python programming, R programming, Machine Learning and Deep Learning. Candidates who are Class 12 pass can apply for this course. The admission is offered based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Eligible students can apply by filling out the online application form.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fees structures for BBA programmes at Roots Collegium?
overview_faqs.answer: Roots Collegium is one of the highly reputed management institutes which is affiliated to Osmania University, Telangana board of Intermediate, Toastmasters, ACCA, Alliance francis, JNAFAU, YI, CII and others.The institute offers a total of 34 courses under 8 different programmes. B.A, BCT, and B.Sc are among the most popular courses offered at Roots Collegium. A total of 15 courses are offered under the B.A programme the fees ranges from INR 90,000 to 2.33 Lacs for B.A. courses.The total tuition fees for B.Sc courses is INR 1.9 lakh.The total tuition fees for B.Com courses ranges from INR 1,20,000 to 1,50,000.The institute also offers Diploma courses the total tuition fees for Diploma courses is INR 1.8 Lakh.

overview_faqs.question: Is Roots Collegium good for BBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Roots Collegium in Hyderabad, India is considered one of the top BBA colleges in the city. It offers internships with top companies and has a placement department that helps final-year BBA students get jobs. 60% of students receive internships in various fields. The institute provides BBA in 2 specializations, BBA and BBA in Analytics. The course has been ranked 54 by the Times and 91 by India Today. The highest package offered is INR 4.8 LPA and the average salary package is INR 2.4 LPA. Overall, the institute is good for B.Sc.

content.Placements: There are 80 to 90 percent of students who join the college annually. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Roots Collegium.

content.Placements: The percentage of the students who got placed is 60 percent, the highest package is 4.50 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA, and the least is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are. Percentage of students who got internships is 40. The top roles offered are Marketing and sales.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and the infrastructure are decent. The college has only one building and there is no place for games or sports. College doesn't have any hostel facilities, but there are private hostels near the college. Classrooms are well-maintained with air conditioning.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am very lucky to be studying in this college.

content.Placements: Placements are really good for a graduate. Amazon, Flipkart, etc. are the top recruiting companies. The average package ranges between 5 to 6 Lacs.
content.Infrastructure: The course is really good, the college infrastructure is good—not the best, but good—we have a library, a playroom, a canteen, a computer lab, and other amenities. However, our campus does not have a hostel. In addition, medical facilities are excellent.
content.Faculty: The teachers are really helpful; most have done an MBA, and very few are new. However, the quality of their teaching is very high. The course content is relevant, and the semester exams are not especially difficult; rather, it is the students who make them difficult by failing to prepare.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: There is no good infrastructure and no value for money, and there will be pressure to pay fees.

content.Placements: About 50% to 60% of students got placements. The highest salary package is 14 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiters include Deloitte and some other tech and marketing companies. A few students got internships in the final year of our course. The top roles provided in our course are business management, marketing lead, HR, and other manager jobs.
content.Infrastructure: A library and air conditioners are available. Because of COVID, there is no canteen. There is no sports zone, no proper ground or place to encourage sports. The classroom is okay. There is no hostel facility. You need to stay at a private hostel. There are no games.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of faculty, but it has good infrastructure and good placements in 2015.

content.Placements: Roots is an amazing college. It provides amazing education, with friendly lecturers who support you in everything. Mostly, above 70% of students were placed in the BBA course. The highest package offered is 10 LPA, the lowest package is 2 LPA, and the average package is around 4-5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Flipkart, Amazon, Paytm etc. Almost 80% of the students got internships in companies like Amazon, Paytm, Facebook etc. The top roles offered are marketing head, product manager etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has amazing facilities like Wi-Fi, library, labs, classrooms and clubhouses. The quality of food is amazing in the canteen. They provide pizza, burgers, sandwiches, fruit juices etc. The college also provides medical facilities. We have a sports club for amazing sports activities.

admission_overview.college_name: Roots Collegium Admission 2025: Eligibility, Application, Fee and Dates

paragraphs: Roots Collegium admissionsare merit-based. Candidates need to meet the course-specific eligibility requirements to get admission in the college.Roots Collegiumoffers UG and diploma courses in multiple streams such as Hotel Management, Arts, Commerce, etc. through various colleges. The college offers some of the courses in affiliation withOsmania University. Interested candidates can apply forRoots Collegium admissionsonline.

Roots Collegium offers 19 courses at UG and diploma levels. Candidates meeting the eligibility requirements of the applied course can get admission in the college. Below areRoots Collegium coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria.

Roots Collegium admission processincludes registration, selection and admission confirmation. Candidates must register for the preferred course to participate in the selection rounds. Aspirants need to follow the below steps to get a seat in the college:
STEP 1: Roots Collegium Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online on the official website of the college. Aspirants need to fill out the application form with personal, academic and contact details. Candidates may also need to pay an application fee to register for a course.
STEP 2: Selection & Admission Confirmation

Roots Collegium shortlists candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The college evaluates the application form to confirm the eligibility of the candidates. Once shortlisted, candidates are informed about that via mail or message. Selected candidates need to pay theRoots Collegium feeto confirm their seat in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college for placements.
reviews.review_text:

2. We don't have a hostel but the food in the canteen is good and we don't have any sports or games to play, basic medical facilities are provided.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied because of the ambiance and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not so good. Fee is quite high and the ambiance is not at all good. What I personally feel is the amount of fee they charge for a BBA course is quite high 54000 isn't a small amount I feel. And the facilities what they provide is literally worse. I hope they make few changes in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the college Roots Collegium
reviews.review_text:
Poor infrastructure. Washrooms are not proper, the urinals are broken. Classrooms have oil paint on walls. No Wi-Fi, no library and an average canteen! Coming to sports and games I can say Zero.
It's just a building with students not even a college!
Coming to the fee, the college management is money hungry! They will ask for the next semester fee early and if you don't pay, they will not give you the Hall ticket for the current semester's Exam. This is pure threatening and it's wrong to ask for ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Roots Collegium.
reviews.review_text: There is a mediocre lab for Psychology, but there is no studio for mass communication students. We are in dire need for the studio in our college. Classrooms are good with air-conditioner facility. There is no hostel facility provided by the college. Other facilities provided are normal. College should at least set up a studio for mass communication students as it is a basic thing for our course. I didn't know where the library is located in our college.

reviews.review_heading: College teaches the life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good with Wi-Fi facility, labs, classrooms, and a library. The canteen is well-maintained and reasonable enough to pay and eat. Quality of food served is very good. A sports ground is not available on the campus. However, there is a ground nearby the college which serves the purpose.

reviews.review_heading: Not so satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: We faced issues during college AC were not working. Wi-Fi facility is not available in campus. About infrastructure, it is good but coming to canteen, it is not so good enough when compared to outside ones. Sports and games will be conducted once in a year.

reviews.review_heading: ROOTS- the best at the worst.
reviews.review_text: Not the best ever, every necessary thing is in working condition but the overall campus doesn't exist. The ground is next to nothing and if you want to have food from college it is impossible because the canteen they have at the college is terrible and they will never accept it.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is good, and you will satisfy with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms in the college were Hi-Fi with Wi-Fi and AC. There will be sports fest every year on the campus. There is no facility of the hostel as it's a day scholar college. I didn't face any issue regarding infrastructure. The faculty members were very professional, and classrooms will be good and maintained well. There is a library and also labs for students in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied regarding the faculty members on the campus.
reviews.review_text: ROOTS Collegium has a good infrastructure. The classrooms are provided with the A/C facility. The canteen is in the 5th-floor. The college provides the Wi-Fi facility. There is a psychology lab. The food will be available from 10 am to 1:40 pm in the canteen. The college provides the mineral water facility. The classrooms are provided with the projector facility.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with decent facilities, good opportunities and need to get better in placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent with A/C classrooms. It is a 5-floor building. There are facilities like spacious parking, basketball court, volleyball court, the canteen also is decent, clean college, and bathrooms are okay. The classrooms benches are also comfortable. The area is good. Everything is nearby the college.
