reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Business Administration - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Experience at Symbiosis Center for Distance Learning.

review_content.Placements: Hi! I have recently finished my two-year Masters at Symbiosis. I was pursuing a Post Graduate Diploma in Business Administration, majored in Marketing and Communication. (Batch: 2017-19) It had a decent percentage of enrollments in the said course above, almost in every branch of the course. The most popular branches are marketing and finance but again, it completely depends on what you're going to pursue ahead and which stream will be the most beneficial to you. Since this is a distance programme, this is specifically tailored for working professionals who want to enhance their skills and qualifications for better opportunities. This programme is also beneficial if you opt-out a regular degree to gain professional experience first and alongside, continue with your studies. SCDL offers a very flexible study and exam schedule so anyone can easily learn whenever suitable to them and also prepare for exams at their own pace. You are not time-bound at all. If I tell you with my personal experience, this provision has both pros and cons. On one hand, it makes very convenient for working professionals like me to balance between hectic working schedules and learning and preparing for exams together, but on the other hand, without a strict deadline, any individual might just procrastinate too much to keep skipping their semester exams and piling up work for later on. Moving on, SCDL doesn't have a fixed placement cell but it offers a job fair once in a year in Pune. Although, it's a reputed institution offering many Diploma/degree/online courses as per one's needs which are accepted in almost all the companies. If you are still unsure, confirm with your employer before joining. I am working in media and entertainment industry and recently got promoted upon completion of this course so it has been beneficial to me.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Business Administration - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Experience at Symbiosis Center for Distance Learning.

content.Placements: Hi! I have recently finished my two-year Masters at Symbiosis. I was pursuing a Post Graduate Diploma in Business Administration, majored in Marketing and Communication. (Batch: 2017-19) It had a decent percentage of enrollments in the said course above, almost in every branch of the course. The most popular branches are marketing and finance but again, it completely depends on what you're going to pursue ahead and which stream will be the most beneficial to you. Since this is a distance programme, this is specifically tailored for working professionals who want to enhance their skills and qualifications for better opportunities. This programme is also beneficial if you opt-out a regular degree to gain professional experience first and alongside, continue with your studies. SCDL offers a very flexible study and exam schedule so anyone can easily learn whenever suitable to them and also prepare for exams at their own pace. You are not time-bound at all. If I tell you with my personal experience, this provision has both pros and cons. On one hand, it makes very convenient for working professionals like me to balance between hectic working schedules and learning and preparing for exams together, but on the other hand, without a strict deadline, any individual might just procrastinate too much to keep skipping their semester exams and piling up work for later on. Moving on, SCDL doesn't have a fixed placement cell but it offers a job fair once in a year in Pune. Although, it's a reputed institution offering many Diploma/degree/online courses as per one's needs which are accepted in almost all the companies. If you are still unsure, confirm with your employer before joining. I am working in media and entertainment industry and recently got promoted upon completion of this course so it has been beneficial to me.

placements.overview:
Vista Institute of Design is a private institute and is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. Vista Institute of Design courses are offered to students at the UG and After 10th levels. The institute offers courses in both Full Time and Part Time modes. Vista Institute of Design offers a total of 12 courses in streams such as Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Architecture & Planning and Animation. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.Sc., After 10th Diploma and UG Diploma. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Fashion Design and Textile Design. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 30,000 to 1,80,000 and the average median salary is around INR 2,17,500. Apart from this, the Vista Institute of Design campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

highlights.summary: Founded in 2005, Amplify Department of Information Technology and Management, Bharati Vidyapeeth University is a public institute. It is located in Pune, Maharashtra. Amplify Department of Information Technology and Management, Bharati Vidyapeeth University provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 3 courses across different specialisations. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.Sc. and M.Sc. Amplify Department of Information Technology and Management, Bharati Vidyapeeth University offers these course across fields such as IT & Software and Animation. The median salary offered to students is INR 3,70,000. Amplify Department of Information Technology and Management, Bharati Vidyapeeth University offers all the campus facilities to students.

placements.overview: Founded in 2005, Amplify Department of Information Technology and Management, Bharati Vidyapeeth University is a public institute. It is located in Pune, Maharashtra. Amplify Department of Information Technology and Management, Bharati Vidyapeeth University provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 3 courses across different specialisations. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.Sc. and M.Sc. Amplify Department of Information Technology and Management, Bharati Vidyapeeth University offers these course across fields such as IT & Software and Animation. The median salary offered to students is INR 3,70,000. Amplify Department of Information Technology and Management, Bharati Vidyapeeth University offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The review of Amplify Department of Information Technology and Management.

review_content.Placements: Although the college is working on placements, the placements are not that much effective as of know. Syllabus to too good, and you can learn a lot from it. Faculty members are also very supportive and helpful. If you focus on studies for 3 years, you will get a good job anywhere.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is neither good nor bad. Labs are very good. You will get good equipment with high configurations. The campus is excellent. Our college also has a playground. Our campus is green and is easily accessible as it is a part of Bharti Vidyapeeth University.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good with good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Companies visit the campus for placements. You need to go to certain places to give the interview scheduled by the college placement team and companies. You need to fulfil certain eligibility criteria to get selected in the companies' interviews. Different companies visit to offer placements for bachelor courses, and different companies visit to offer placements for masters courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. The college is in university, so you get the ground to play games. The college also provides a Wi-Fi facility. The roads in the college are good. There is a parking facility. There is a canteen, but the taste of the food offered is not that good. If you get the food from your home or the medical college or some other colleges in this university, then it would be good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Amplify-DITM, Bharati Vidyapeeth University.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are being guided by the placement cell. Students are informed regularly about the drives. They also help you with your resume building and selection process. Apart from that, they help you with job opportunities outside the college. If you get in to touch with them about the industry trends before the placement season, they help you with your skills required to be updated and improved. They even help you with an alternative path like some career guidance or further studies. It is like a saying 'Help come to those who ask for it', you need to be dedicated for it and have to take the processes seriously.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I pursued a short course but gained vast knowledge.

review_content.Placements: I got placed in Capgemini with a salary package offer of 2.10 LPA. There are no visits by companies on the campus. But they are connected to different campuses, and we get placement opportunities through off-campus drives. The college is good for add-on courses. If you complete your 3 years course with above 8 SGPA, then you have a chance to pursue your 4th year in Ireland for completing your BE. There is a lot of scope for placements in Ireland, and you also get your BE international degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides many facilities like Wi-Fi facility and well-structured labs with high configuration systems. The campus is not very big and is only 2 floors, but it is okay as per the student count. There are separate classes for theory and practicals. The college also has a library. There are also sports events organised every year.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The worst college in terms of management but par good in terms of course curriculum.

review_content.Placements: Do not take admission here if you are looking for placements as the placement cell of this college is not active and not capable of getting students placed in good MNCs. In my batch, only one student got placed with a package of 2 LPA, which is very less, it is not even a campus drive as it is a pool campus which is 40 km away from the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The whole college is of two different buildings acquiring one floor of each. Both the buildings are far at a distance of 500 meters. The lab facilities are good but cannot accommodate more than 40 students. The lecture halls are not air-conditioned. It becomes very difficult to sit and study in hot rooms for hours.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Animation and Gaming - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: This college is better than other animation colleges.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell at our college works with students and finds companies for our internships as well as our placement. Our placement faculty are also nice, and the volunteer students also work there as they can help in finding good companies for our placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not very nice as it is only 1 floor and the building is also not owned by the college. Other than that, the classes are well-equipped with A/C and projector. The computers are high-end pc with very nice configurations.

reviews.review_heading: I pursued a short course but gained vast knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The college provides many facilities like Wi-Fi facility and well-structured labs with high configuration systems. The campus is not very big and is only 2 floors, but it is okay as per the student count. There are separate classes for theory and practicals. The college also has a library. There are also sports events organised every year.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college in terms of management but par good in terms of course curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The whole college is of two different buildings acquiring one floor of each. Both the buildings are far at a distance of 500 meters. The lab facilities are good but cannot accommodate more than 40 students. The lecture halls are not air-conditioned. It becomes very difficult to sit and study in hot rooms for hours.

reviews.review_heading: This college is better than other animation colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not very nice as it is only 1 floor and the building is also not owned by the college. Other than that, the classes are well-equipped with A/C and projector. The computers are high-end pc with very nice configurations.

reviews.review_heading: Review of bachelor degree in game designing in AVIM, BVU.
reviews.review_text: BVDU campus is very good with a big area. The infrastructure isn't that good as it doesn't have its own building, and there is a lot to do. The labs are equipped with AC and good computers. The area is really small, but it can hold a lot of students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is one of the best college to study information techniques.
reviews.review_text: There are 6 labs and 8 lecture halls in total. All the rooms are fully air conditioned with high-speed Wi-Fi. The canteen has awesome food. The PCs in the lab have the latest technologies. Digital screens, Leads and projectors are available in every laboratories.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amplify department of information technology and management.
reviews.review_text: As it's not the college but a department, it is on 2nd and 3rd floor. On the third floor, there are cafeteria and lecture halls, and on the 2nd floor there are six labs, all are fully equipped, and there are 6 lecture halls as well. The food available in the canteen is pretty good and pocket-friendly. The hostels are there for girls and boys in the university, and they are triple seater rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Good, there are some rules which are annoying, but overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The washrooms are good, but they need the attention. Or else, the entire floor is well-maintained. The labs are good now, and the PCs are upgraded as well. So on a whole scale, it is good. The lecture halls are equipped decently and are good. The faculty and the coordinators are amazing. They are like mentors and will be on your side for everything you need, and they take good care of you.

college_info.college_name: Frameboxx 2.0 Animation and Visual Effects, FC Road

highlights.summary:
Frameboxx 2.0 Animation and Visual Effects, popularly known as Frameboxx was set up in 2008 to impart industrially relevant specialised education in the field of Animation, Design, Arts, Planning, Architecture and any more. It is located in Pune and it is the only national training studio that is owned and run by Industry professionals. Since its inception, the institute has emerged as a centre of excellence in learning and innovation as it has trained more than 5,000 professionals across the country. The institute has several affiliations to offer degree and specialised certificate courses that enhance professional competence and provides distinguished learning. The details of all the affiliations are listed below:

In addition to this, Frameboxx has also partnered with the Government of India for the Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojna (PMKVY) Scheme for the need of a skilled workforce. Frameboxx has several collaborations with internationally acclaimed technologists and various animation and VFX studios that offer experiential learning to the students. The institute has a team of experienced and passionate instructors who reinforce the curriculum by conducting master class sessions regularly. It provides weekend workshops, training by industry experts and high-end vocational training programmes as well. To meet the quality educational aspects of the students, it conducts training in 3D Animation, VFX, Graphic Design, Web Designing, Photography, Gaming, etc. It also conducts webinars to aim for high-quality online training sessions free for all students interested to learn in the same field.

The major aspects of the institute are tabulated below:

Admission to all the programme offered at Frameboxx is granted based on aggregate obtained by eligible candidates in previous qualifying degree/ exam and seat availability. To apply for the programme, candidates need to visit the official website of the institute to fill the application form and pay the prescribed application fee online. After the completion of application shortlisting process, candidates need to visit the campus of the institute atleast once to complete further admission formalities and seat allotment.

The institute offers skill-based courses to help students specialise in Animation, VFX, Game Asset Design, Graphic Design, Web Design & Development, Multimedia, Broadcast design and other related creative and technical sectors. The details regarding same is tabulated below:

Frameboxx has one of the most transparent placements portals that provides career opportunities to its students in leading Animation and VFX studios all over India. It provides 100 per cent placements assistance to the students for on and off-campus placements every year. Frameboxx alumni have successfully secured professional career with their preferred job category. Some of the top companies where the students of Frameboxx have been placed over the years are listed below:

Check details regarding Frameboxx placements

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Frameboxx 2.0 Animation and Visual Effects, FC Road offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time and Part Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ). At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Sc. and B.Voc. Whereas, at PG level, Frameboxx 2.0 Animation and Visual Effects, FC Road offers courses such as M.A. Frameboxx 2.0 Animation and Visual Effects, FC Road fee structure for all the courses is around INR 15,000 to 5,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2023

review_content.Placements: Our college provides placements for science and B.Ed students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure includes a big ground, computer lab, chemistry lab, psychology lab, hostel, canteen, medical room, sports room one badminton court and basketball court, and a library. These all are amazingly building and in the sports room, you can find different types of games.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are highly corporative and knowledgeable about their subjects. There is not much exam burden on students as there are only 2 exams held an overall year and they are the mid term and the finals. The passing percentage is average 35% to be precise.

reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: The college placements are below average. No MNCs visit our college for placements. There are cultural activities, and my role was an event organiser. None of the students got an internship in my batch. Overall, the college placements are not good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is well designed. There are all the facilities like Wi-Fi and well-maintained labs. There is a huge library for study. Good quality food is available in the mess. Good medical facilities are available.
